subject: Fix dmaap-dr-node deployment failing
commit_message:
Fix dmaap-dr-node deployment failing

imagePullSecrets was not correctly indented and thus creds were not
read.

Change-Id: I62f2992aa23f968841b9dfefe84aed6931659800
Issue-ID: OOM-1560
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/1419/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/1419

Patch Set 1:

see my comments for dmaap - could be same red-herring - it is just an image pull timing issue - see TSC-79

looks good - can't auth the gerrit review - I did start seeing this in casablanca recently  - but master is fine - are you sure the auth issue is secondary to the pull delay on the images

Patch Set 1:

This fix is not required - the failures in dmaap are random timing related - some  (a small percentage) deployments run in master and 3.0.0-ONAP to completion out of the box depending on the deployment sequencing and delay config
Change has been successfully merged by Mike Elliott
